title: The title in Docs still appears even though the 'show title' toggle is switched off
excerpt:
Description
The title in Docs (made into a shareable link) still appears even though the ‘show title’ toggle is switched off and it appears in a Times New Roman font (ie different font to the rest of the content in the D…

posts.author: sanloi (San)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The title in Docs (made into a shareable link) still appears even though the ‘show title’ toggle is switched off and it appears in a Times New Roman font (ie different font to the rest of the content in the Docs)

What are you trying to achieve

For the toggle to work ie if I don’t want it to show, switching the toggle ‘Title’ off will remove the Title from the Doc (when the viewer reviews the Doc)

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sanloi, Welcome to the community!

This would be a great addition.

At the moment, the “Show title” toggle only controls the title inside the editable Doc view, not the system header that appears in the public/shared version. That’s why the title still appears in the shared link, Also, it uses a different font (it’s rendered as a system header, not formatted Doc content)

As a workaround, we typically rename the Doc to something simple and clean so the system header isn’t distracting, since it can’t currently be hidden.
